title: What is the reason for not having any default export in your module?
author: rantiev
body:
It's pain connecting this module. Why no default exports? 
Why you have bare version, but doesn't have bare browser version? Some apps already contain promises polyfil. For example angular overrides promises (for zone.js work) and if your library connected after angular started (it probably will because it will be used in angular service or controller) it fails.

comments.author: rantiev
comments.body: Why ES5 is not really es5, fast-csv dependency contains arrow functions. Is this es5?
